calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Heather Ledgerwood for petitioner Monica Barboza (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Establish Fact, Time, and Place of Death.

The Court noted that it had reviewed the petition and found that everything appeared to be in order.

The Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
